description_long: This is a small, single-engine airplane with a high-wing configuration and a sleek, streamlined fuselage painted primarily in blue with white and blue accent stripes. The wings are straight and mounted above the cabin, providing good visibility below and to the sides. The tail section features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, both accented with blue and white stripes. The landing gear is fixed in a tricycle arrangement, with two main wheels under the wings and a nose wheel beneath the engine. The cockpit is forward-mounted, enclosed with transparent windows, and appears to accommodate one or two seats. The propeller is mounted at the nose, indicating a piston engine typical of light general aviation aircraft.
description: A small, blue and white high-wing airplane with a single nose-mounted propeller, fixed tricycle landing gear, and a forward, enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the tail section, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the high-mounted wings with blue and white stripes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, fixed tricycle landing gear, and the nose-mounted propeller.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the propeller, forward cockpit windows, and the full wingspan with blue accent stripes.
description_view_3: Top-rear oblique view emphasizing the high-wing configuration, tail assembly, and the overall aerodynamic shape.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with side windows, likely single or dual seat.
